Black walnut tree behind number 8 building at Brandywine Apartments Falling Fruit season: October-November.

Tall pear tree with lots of pears. It's on someone's property. So ask the homeowners. Or pick up the ones on the grounds. Homeowners should be fine with that since hundreds of pears fall on the ground every year. Access: Private. Falling Fruit season: June-Aug
Brandywine Apartments has two large persimmon trees near swimming pool. Falling Fruit season: September-October.
